title: OpenAI recruits engineers to expand robotics hardware and AI development
description: OpenAI is hiring hardware, software, and machine learning engineers to build robots in-house. The push signals a move beyond language models into physical AI systems.

title: Strade interne, via ai cantieri

title: Solana (SOL) Alpenglow Upgrade Cuts Finality to 150ms as Ruvi (RUVI) AI Superapp Fills Phase 3 at $0.020
description: Solana (SOL) Alpenglow Upgrade Cuts Finality to 150ms as Ruvi (RUVI) AI Superapp Fills Phase 3 at $0. Visit https://ruvi.io for details.020 Solana's (SOL) Alpenglow consensus upgrade, approved by 98.27% of stakers, went live on a test cluster earlier this month

title: Gradient Labs doubles Series A to $26m to build AI agents for financial services
description: Gradient Labs raised $13M to double its Series A to $26M, backing AI agents that automate lending, disputes, and identity checks for banks. The startup, founded by ex-Monzo staff, reported 900% revenue growth and serves over 32 million end users.

title: The Alarming Trend of Relying on AI for Emotional and Spiritual Needs
description: The increasing use of large language models for companionship and spiritual guidance is a concerning development that may have devastating consequences for human flourishing.
